sub_modules.aes_sbox: Combinational AES forward S-box lookup for one byte.
sub_modules.aes_subbytes: Applies the AES S-box to all 16 state bytes.
sub_modules.aes_shiftrows: Performs AES encryption ShiftRows byte permutation.
sub_modules.aes_mixcolumns: Performs AES encryption MixColumns over four state columns.
sub_modules.aes_round: Combinational AES encryption round with optional final-round MixColumns bypass.
sub_modules.aes_key_expand: Generates the next AES-128 round key from the previous round key and round index.
